base_query: ("administrative data" OR "observational study" OR "regression analysis" OR econometric OR "difference-in-differences" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "cohort study" OR "linked data" OR "statistical analysis") AND (pilot OR "rolled out" OR rollout OR implemented OR introduced OR trialled OR launched OR expanded OR "scale up" OR approved OR scrapped OR mandated OR "decided to" OR "plans to" OR "will introduce" OR evaluation) AND NOT (sentencing OR prosecution OR defendant OR verdict OR convicted OR charged OR magistrate OR "crown court" OR jury OR appeal OR tournament OR championship OR "premier league" OR goal OR coach OR match OR album OR film OR theatre OR premiere OR "box office" OR "randomised controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR "randomised control trial" OR "randomized control trial" OR "control group" OR "randomly assigned" OR placebo OR "clinical trials" OR randomized OR randomised OR trial OR rct OR placebo OR "control group" OR "randomised controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR RCT)
